summary: Classified the mixed PR inventory shard without GitHub mutation. No shared canonical is set because the job explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster. Close, merge, fix, and fix-PR execution are not available for this run, so open PRs are kept for their own review paths; one security-sensitive linked ref is routed to central security handling; one maintainer-owned taxonomy PR needs human source-of-truth judgment.
